title: Murder probe after man's body found in caravan
description: Police say a 56-year-old man has been arrested on suspicion of murder and remains in custody.
content:
A murder investigation is under way after a man's body was found in a caravan in a lay-by in Loughborough.
Leicestershire Police said a report of a sudden death in Derby Road was made at about 23:40 BST on Monday. East Midlands Ambulance Service atte... [701 chars]

title: Trump gives Zelenskyy vague promise of licence to manufacture Patriot missiles
description: Licence would be diplomatic coup for Kyiv but process of making munitions would likely be expensive, complex and long
content: Donald Trump has told Volodymyr Zelenskyy that Ukraine may be allowed to manufacture Patriot missile interceptors to counter Russian ballistic attacks. It would be a diplomatic coup for Kyiv, which has been struggling to counter Moscow’s increasing m... [3658 chars]

title: Trump says US ‘may take over Kharg Island’: Here’s what you need to know
description: Kharg Island, pivotal to Iran’s oil exports, becomes focal point as Trump renews threats amid rising Gulf tensions.
content:
US President Donald Trump has once again turned his focus to Kharg Island, Iran’s main oil export hub, after declaring an interim ceasefire with Iran “over” and warning the US was preparing more strikes.

title: Andrey Santos: Manchester United agree £50m deal for Chelsea and Brazil midfielder
description: Man Utd agree £50m deal to sign Chelsea midfielder Andrey Santos; deal features £48m guaranteed payment and £2m in add-ons, plus a 10 per cent sell-on clause; Santos is preparing to undergo a medical with Michael Carricks side
content:
Manchester United have agreed a £50m deal to sign Chelsea midfielder Andrey Santos.
The agreement is broken up into a guaranteed £48m payment plus £2m in add-ons. Chelsea will also retain a 10 per cent sell-on clause.
